Hotels

Find the perfect place to stay, from luxury resorts to cozy local inns.

Find Accommodations

Cape Seaductive Resort & Spa

Bas Mangcamag in Basilisa is a luxury eco-resort that combines indulgence with sustainability. Priced at around ₱7,000–12,000 with meals included, it offers elegant accommodations surrounded by lush greenery and pristine waters—perfect for a tranquil island escape.

Casa de Mercedes

This mid-range B&B offers modern cabins at an affordable rate of ₱1,000–1,500 for a double room. Comfortable and contemporary, it’s a great option for travelers seeking value and style, with easy booking via call or text at +63 995 672 2896.

Island View Suites

Island View Suites is a small hotel in San Jose, offering simple accommodations with a modest charm. Rated 3.0 from one review, it stands as the town’s only listed small hotel, making it a practical choice for travelers seeking a convenient stay with basic comforts.
